articles.title: Borussia Dortmund surprisingly sacks sporting director Sebastien Kehl
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, MARCH 22 - Borussia Dortmund parts ways with one of its flags. The German club announced on its website the dismissal of Sebastian Kehl, the club's sporting director from 2022.

articles.title: The 76th Viareggio tournament has ended: a team has won after 34 years
articles.summary: (ANSA) - VIAREGGIO (LUCCA), MARCH 23 - Fiorentina won the 76th Viareggio Cup world youth tournament by beating Rijeka 4-1 in the final played at the Stadio dei Pini. The purple team won after extra time.
